fields.description: Display name e.g. 'Main WhatsApp Business' or 'Africa's Talking SMS — Production'
fields.label: Channel Name
Channel Type
fields.options:
WhatsApp Cloud API
Meta Business (FB/IG)
SMTP Email
Africa's Talking SMS
Twilio SMS
FCM Push
Other

fields.description: Mark ONE connection per channel_type as the default. Phase 5 senders pick the default if none specified.
fields.label: Is Default for Type

fields.description: Last successful provider sync or message send
fields.label: Last Sync / Send

fields.description: Most recent error returned by the provider
fields.label: Last Error

fields.description: Prefix of the site_config.json keys holding the secret credentials for this connection (e.g. 'whatsapp_' → site_config.whatsapp_token, whatsapp_phone_id, etc.). DocType row does NOT store secrets.
fields.label: Credentials Prefix in site_config

fields.description: Soft cap on messages per day on this channel. Senders block once exceeded. 0 = no cap.
fields.label: Daily Cap

fields.description: Auto-reset to 0 every day by scheduler
fields.label: Sent Today

fields.description: Rough monthly spend (informational; actual cost lives in Campaign Send Log)
fields.label: Monthly Estimated Cost

fields.description: e.g. WhatsApp Business Account ID, Meta Page ID, AT username — non-secret identifiers
fields.label: Provider Account ID

fields.description: e.g. WhatsApp Cloud phone_number_id, sender ID for SMS
fields.label: Provider Phone / Sender ID

fields.description: Non-secret token Meta returns during webhook handshake — safe to store here
fields.label: Webhook Verify Token

fields.description: Public URL the provider should POST callbacks to (e.g. https://yourgym.co.ke/api/method/...)
fields.label: Webhook Callback URL
